title: Statements and speeches from the Chief Public Health Officer of Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Statements and speeches from the Chief Public Health Officer of Canada
One of the roles of the Chief Public Health Officer of Canada (CPHO) is to communicate public health information to the Canadian public. This includes sharing information related to the health and safety of Canadians through regular statements and live updates (speeches) to the public and the media.
